title: sutera antirrhinoides
intro: Sutera antirrhinoides, also known as the Madagascar orchid or butterfly flower, is a plant species in the family Pedaliaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sutera antirrhinoides include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and reducing inflammation and pain. Sutera antirrhinoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies such as tinctures and poultices.
